tracks.meaning: a large vessel designed to travel on water, typically for transporting cargo or passengers
to send or transport something or someone from one place to another
to manage or organize the movement of goods in a supply chain or logistics operation
to move quickly or depart hastily
a warship or armed naval vessel
to transport cargo, passengers, or materials by water or other means
to send data or files across a network or communication system
a large container or hold designed to carry and store bulk goods during transport
to transfer ownership or legal responsibility of goods to a recipient
